judging_guidelines: Evaluate clarity and precision of language.
Penalize ambiguous phrasing that could be interpreted multiple ways.
good_overall_examples:
## Install

```bash
npm install my-package
```

Run with: `npx my-package --input file.txt`
bad_overall_examples: You can install the package using npm or yarn or pnpm, depending on your preference...

scores.example: Do the thing with the file somehow.
Process the input file using the tool.

scores.anchor: Frequently switches terms for the same concept
scores.example: Use the library / module / package interchangeably.
Always uses 'package' to refer to the dependency.
